proof fn phi_4_l4_dom_singleton_but_closure_unbounded(pt: PageTable, p: PageMapPtr)
    requires
        pt.wf_l4(),
        pt.l3_tables@.dom().contains(p),
    ensures

{
}
reason: page_closure is the union of all table domains — any pointer in l3/l2/l1 domains is in the closure alongside cr3, but there is no constraint that these domains are disjoint from each other or from the l4 domain at the page_closure level

proof fn phi_5_tlb_submap_no_wf_required(pt: PageTable, cpu: CpuId, va: VAddr)
    requires
        pt.tlb_wf(),
        pt.tlb_submap_of_mapping(),

        pt.tlb_mapping_4k@[cpu as int].dom().contains(va),
    ensures

        pt.tlb_mapping_4k@[cpu as int][va] == pt.mapping_4k@[va],
{
}
reason: tlb_submap_of_mapping ensures TLB entries are submaps of the full mapping without requiring the full page table wf() — TLB consistency is asserted independently of structural well-formedness, potentially allowing stale TLB entries when the page table structure is broken
